story.i_want: Implement conversation accumulation pattern for retry logic when Devin session resumption is not viable
story.so_that: Failed verification steps can be retried with full conversation context, allowing agents to see and fix previous errors

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Each step execution creates a node-specific directory
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a saga step execution, When the step completes, Then a node-specific directory is created at .sagas/<saga-id>/<node-name>/attempt_<N>/

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Three files captured per attempt: input.txt, output.txt, verification.txt
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step execution, When state is captured, Then input.txt, output.txt, and verification.txt are written to the attempt directory

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Retry attempts compose accumulated conversation history
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a failed verification, When a retry is triggered, Then the new prompt contains original input + all previous outputs + all previous verification feedback

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Logs clearly show retry attempts and accumulated prompt sizes
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a retry attempt, When logs are examined, Then they show attempt number and accumulated prompt size

related_edge_cases.criterion: First attempt (no previous attempts to accumulate)
related_edge_cases.gherkin: Given a step execution on first attempt, When state is captured, Then input.txt contains original prompt only
Given accumulated prompt exceeds token limits, When retry is attempted, Then agent returns error and verification fails
Given verification script runs successfully with no output, When state is captured, Then verification.txt is empty or contains success indicator

steps.description: Modify Orchestrator._write_session_state() to accept saga_id, node_name, and attempt_number parameters
Implement directory creation logic in _write_session_state() to create .sagas/<saga-id>/<node-name>/attempt_<N>/ structure
Implement file writing in _write_session_state() to write input.txt, output.txt, and verification.txt
Implement Orchestrator._determine_attempt_number() method to scan node directory and return next attempt number
Implement Orchestrator.compose_retry_prompt() method to load previous attempts and build accumulated conversation
Update Orchestrator.invoke_step() to accept and use saga context (saga_id, node_name, attempt_number)
Add logging for attempt number determination and accumulated prompt composition
Write unit tests for _determine_attempt_number() with various directory states
Write unit tests for compose_retry_prompt() with various attempt histories
Write unit tests for _write_session_state() with new directory structure
Write integration tests for full orchestrator flow with retries

documentation: docs/reqs/fix-devin-resume/fix-devin-resume-retry-logic.design.json - Design document with contracts and responsibilities
code: orchestrator/devin_wrapper.py - DevinWrapper for understanding prompt execution
orchestrator/tests/test_saga_state.py - Existing state management tests for reference
